goal: prove Claude primary runtime by running minimal Claude workflow and obtaining commit SHA
required_secret: CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN presence only; token must never be printed
acceptance: Claude creates a minimal proof commit
provider route may set primary_proven=true only after SHA exists

workflow_candidates.preview:
name: Analyst

on:
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: write
  pull-requests: write
  actions: read

jobs:
  analyst:
    if: contains(github.event.comment.body, '@analyst')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    concurrency:
      group: analyst-${{ github.event.issue.number }}
      cancel-in-progress: false

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Load analyst prompt
        id: role_prompt
        shell: bash
        run: |
          {
            echo 'text<<EOF'
            cat governance/prompts/analyst_prompt.md
            echo 'EOF'
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Run as ANALYST
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        with:
          claude_code_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          github_token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
          trigger_phrase: "@analyst"
          prompt: |
            ${{ steps.role_prompt.outputs.text }}

            Входящий комментарий:
            ${{ github.event.comment.body }}

            Работай строго как АНАЛИТИК. Опубликуй отчёт в текущем issue. В конце отчёта вызови @auditor.

name: Audit Mailbox Watcher

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/**'
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor/**'
      - 'governance/agreements/active/**'
      - 'scripts/audit_mailbox_watcher.py'
      - '.github/workflows/audit-mailbox-watcher.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: audit-mailbox-watcher
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  audit-mailbox-watcher:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Syntax check watcher
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/audit_mailbox_watcher.py
      - name: Run watcher
        run: python3 scripts/audit_mailbox_watcher.py
      - name: Commit watcher state
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/audit_mailbox_watcher_state.json governance/reports/audit_mailbox_watcher_report.md governance/telegram/outbox/audit_mailbox_notification.json
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || g

name: Auditor

on:
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

permissions:
  contents: read
  issues: write
  pull-requests: write
  actions: read

jobs:
  auditor:
    if: contains(github.event.comment.body, '@auditor')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    concurrency:
      group: auditor-${{ github.event.issue.number }}
      cancel-in-progress: false

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Load auditor prompt
        id: role_prompt
        shell: bash
        run: |
          {
            echo 'text<<EOF'
            cat governance/prompts/auditor_prompt.md
            echo 'EOF'
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Run as AUDITOR
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        with:
          claude_code_oauth_token: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          github_token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
          trigger_phrase: "@auditor"
          prompt: |
            ${{ steps.role_prompt.outputs.text }}

            Входящий комментарий:
            ${{ github.event.comment.body }}

            Работай строго как АУДИТОР. Проверь независимо. Дай APPROVED или BLOCKED. В конце вызови @executor или @

name: Claude Primary Provider Gate

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/claude_primary_provider_gate.trigger'
      - 'scripts/claude_primary_provider_gate.py'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-primary-provider-gate.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-primary-provider-gate
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  check-claude-provider:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check provider gate script
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/claude_primary_provider_gate.py

      - name: Write provider gate result
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
        run: python3 scripts/claude_primary_provider_gate.py

      - name: Commit provider gate result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/provider_gates/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.json governance/reports/b

name: Claude Primary Runtime Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.trigger'
      - 'scripts/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-primary-runtime-smoke.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-primary-runtime-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  claude-primary-runtime-smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check Claude runtime smoke
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py

      - name: Run Claude runtime smoke
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          AUDITOR_MODEL: ${{ secrets.AUDITOR_MODEL }}
        run: python3 scripts/claude_primary_runtime_smoke.py

      - name: Commit Claude runtime smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json governance/reports/claude_primary_r

name: Claude Token Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - '.github/workflows/claude-token-smoke.yml'
      - 'scripts/claude_token_smoke.py'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-token-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  check-secret:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Check secret presence and write report
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        run: python3 scripts/claude_token_smoke.py

      - name: Commit smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/reports/bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md governance/transport/results.jsonl
          git commit -m "BEM-568 Claude token smoke result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase origin main || git rebase --abort || true
          git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)

name: Claude Code

# BEM-477: added transport result write + file report
# BEM-488: YAML-safe rewrite — no f-string multiline, Python-based summary
# NO createComment to issue #31 (locked at 2500 comments)

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      role:
        description: 'analyst | auditor | executor | curator'
        required: true
        type: string
      provider:
        description: 'claude'
        required: false
        default: 'claude'
        type: string
      trace_id:
        description: 'Trace id'
        required: true
        type: string
      cycle_id:
        description: 'Role cycle id'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
      task_type:
        description: 'Task type'
        required: false
        default: 'default_development'
        type: string
      task:
        description: 'Task body'
        required: false
        default: ''
        type: string
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]
  issues:
    types: [opened, assigned]
  pull_request_review_comment:
    types: [created]
  pull_request_review:
    types: [submitted]

permissions:
  contents: write
  pull-requests: write
  issues: write
  id-token: write

name: Curator Hosted GPT

on:
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: write
  actions: write

jobs:
  hosted-gpt-curator:
    name: Hosted GPT Curator
    if: |
      github.event.issue.number == 31 &&
      contains(github.event.comment.body, '@curator') &&
      !contains(github.event.comment.body, 'BEM-GPT-CURATOR | RUN RESULT') &&
      !contains(github.event.comment.body, 'BEM-ROLE-ORCHESTRATOR | RUN RESULT') &&
      github.event.comment.user.type != 'Bot'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1
          token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}

      - name: Write curator comment
        shell: bash
        env:
          COMMENT_BODY_JSON: ${{ toJson(github.event.comment.body) }}
        run: |
          set -e
          COMMENT_FILE="$RUNNER_TEMP/curator_comment_body.txt"
          python3 - <<'PY'
          import json
          import os
          from pathlib import Path
          body = json.loads(os.environ['COMMENT_BODY_JSON'])
          Path(os.environ['RUNNER_TEMP'], 'curator_comment_body.txt').

name: Curator

on:
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]

permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: write
  actions: read

jobs:
  gateway-diagnostic:
    name: Curator Gateway Diagnostic
    if: |
      github.event.issue.number == 31 &&
      github.actor != 'github-actions[bot]' &&
      github.event.comment.user.type != 'Bot' &&
      contains(github.event.comment.body, '@curator')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 5

    steps:
      - name: Post gateway diagnostic report
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          github-token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
          script: |
            let runnerLines = [];
            let runnerSummary = 'unknown';
            try {
              const runners = await github.rest.actions.listSelfHostedRunnersForRepo({
                owner: context.repo.owner,
                repo: context.repo.repo,
                per_page: 100
              });
              const list = runners.data.runners || [];
              runnerSummary = `${list.length} self-hosted runner(s) visible`;
              if (list.length === 0) {
                runnerLines.push('| self-hosted runners | ❌ | none visible to AI_SYSTE

name: Provider Adapter

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      cycle_id:
        description: Internal role cycle id
        required: true
        type: string
      provider:
        description: Primary provider
        required: true
        default: claude
        type: string
      role:
        description: Role requesting provider
        required: true
        type: string
      status:
        description: completed, failed, cancelled, timeout, missing_result_after_ttl, unknown
        required: true
        default: unknown
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  adapt:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Probe and select provider

          python3 - <<PY
          import json
          from pathlib import Path
          cycle_id = "${{ inputs.cycle_id }}"
          provider = "${{ inputs.provider }}"
          role = "${{ inputs.role }}"
          signal = "${{ inputs.status }}"
          transport = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")
          state_path = Path("governance/state/provider_contour_state.json")
          if signal in ["completed", "active

name: Role Router

on:
  issue_comment:
    types: [created]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      role:
        description: 'Logical role: analyst | auditor | executor'
        required: true
        type: string
      task:
        description: 'Task description'
        required: false
        type: string
      trace_id:
        description: 'Curator trace id for workflow_dispatch proof runs'
        required: false
        type: string

jobs:
  route:
    if: |
      github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
      (github.event.issue.number == 31 &&
       contains(github.event.comment.body, 'TYPE: CURATOR_TO_ROLE') &&
       !contains(github.event.comment.body, 'TYPE: CURATOR_TO_ROLE_EXECUTION') &&
       contains(github.event.comment.body, 'TRACE_ID:'))
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      issues: write

    concurrency:
      group: role-router
      cancel-in-progress: false

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Read routing and dispatch role
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}
          INPUT_ROLE: ${{ inputs.role }}
